subject: weather report 10pm
body:
Jeffrey,
Paris weather: wind 10 to 20  mph
 Tuesday - Friday- morning fog with visibility 1 mile or less  followed by 
Rain showers, High temperature 54 degrees and lows 49  degrees in the evenings. 
Saturday  and Sunday: clearing is expected high 61 degrees,  lows 45 degrees, 
partly cloudy.
Monday: light rain.
LSJ weather:
Tuesday - Thursday, sun with, afternoon scattered  thunderstorms, High 86 
degrees, low 79 degrees.
Friday - Sunday: scattered afternoon showers, typical for area,  afternoon 
sunshine
Looking at the satellite for LSJ, there is a area 300 to east of  LSJ moving 
North and should not effect St.  Thomas.

body_html:
Jeffrey,
Paris weather: wind 10 to 20 mph
 Tuesday - Friday- morning fog with visibility 1 mile or less followed by Rain showers, High temperature 54 degrees and lows 49 degrees in the evenings.
Saturday  and Sunday: clearing is expected high 61 degrees, lows 45 degrees, partly cloudy.
Monday: light rain.
LSJ weather:
Tuesday - Thursday, sun with, afternoon scattered thunderstorms, High 86 degrees, low 79 degrees.
Friday - Sunday: scattered afternoon showers, typical for area, afternoon sunshine
Looking at the satellite for LSJ, there is a area 300 to east of LSJ moving North and should not effect St. Thomas.
